title: Understanding Inflation
context: Last year, a loaf of bread cost £1.00. This year, the same bread costs £1.10.

questions.question: What is 'inflation'?
options: When prices go up over time
questions.answer: When prices go up over time

questions.question: What does 'afford' mean?
options: Have enough money to buy something
questions.answer: Have enough money to buy something

questions.question: What does 'cost of living' mean?
options: How much money you need to live
questions.answer: How much money you need to live

maths_section.instruction: Answer the maths questions about prices.

questions.question: How much more does bread cost this year?
If milk goes from £1.00 to £1.05, how much more?
If everything costs 10% more, a £50 shop now costs...
